records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Try the refugee center if you want blood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Try the refugee center if you want blood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Try the refugee center if you want blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They give it away for free.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They give it away for free.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They give it away for free.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But me? I'm expensive! You got any idea how much I charge per hour?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But me? I'm expensive! You got any idea how much I charge per hour?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But me? I'm expensive! You got any idea how much I charge per hour?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... Blood... So hungry... Blood...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... Blood... So hungry... Blood...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... Blood... So hungry... Blood...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I'm in pain! This burns, you know?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I'm in pain! This burns, you know?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I'm in pain! This burns, you know?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hot... Blood... It burns my mouth... but it tastes so good...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hot... Blood... It burns my mouth... but it tastes so good...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hot... Blood... It burns my mouth... but it tastes so good...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Would you listen when I'm talking?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Would you listen when I'm talking?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Would you listen when I'm talking?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oww...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oww...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oww...

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-did I pass out...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-did I pass out...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-did I pass out...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My <color=#ffd34c>Goetia</color>!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My <color=#ffd34c>Goetia</color>!
records.m_Talk_FRA: My <color=#ffd34c>Goetia</color>!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-where's my Goetia?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-where's my Goetia?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-where's my Goetia?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, so this book's called Goetia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, so this book's called Goetia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, so this book's called Goetia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks for the info. I'll put it to good use.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks for the info. I'll put it to good use.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks for the info. I'll put it to good use.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Gasp*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Gasp*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Gasp*

records.m_Talk_ENG: No! Not Goetia!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No! Not Goetia!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No! Not Goetia!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Give it back!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Give it back!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Give it back!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk, tsk. In this world, the winner takes all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk, tsk. In this world, the winner takes all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk, tsk. In this world, the winner takes all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A book that spits out C.O.s... Bet I could sell this for a fortune.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A book that spits out C.O.s... Bet I could sell this for a fortune.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A book that spits out C.O.s... Bet I could sell this for a fortune.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehehe... Hehehe... *Slurp*
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehehe... Hehehe... *Slurp*
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehehe... Hehehe... *Slurp*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oops, my bad. I was drooling a little.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oops, my bad. I was drooling a little.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oops, my bad. I was drooling a little.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... you food waste!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... you food waste!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... you food waste!

records.m_Talk_ENG: F-food waste? Why you little...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: F-food waste? Why you little...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: F-food waste? Why you little...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't sleep without that book!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't sleep without that book!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't sleep without that book!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you a little old to be clinging to a security blanket?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you a little old to be clinging to a security blanket?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you a little old to be clinging to a security blanket?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess this is your chance to learn to sleep without it. Lucky you.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess this is your chance to learn to sleep without it. Lucky you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And why would I do that?

records.m_Talk_FRA: And why would I do that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're awful! You're a devil!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're awful! You're a devil!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're awful! You're a devil!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah. I bust my butt for money, you broke in uninvited.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah. I bust my butt for money, you broke in uninvited.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah. I bust my butt for money, you broke in uninvited.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which one of us sounds more like a devil?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which one of us sounds more like a devil?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which one of us sounds more like a devil?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Obviously you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Obviously you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Obviously you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're a heretic! A con who scams people for money!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're a heretic! A con who scams people for money!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're a heretic! A con who scams people for money!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh. You catch on quick for a kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh. You catch on quick for a kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh. You catch on quick for a kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hey. That aside, don't you think something's off?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hey. That aside, don't you think something's off?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's off is your obsession with money.

records.m_Talk_FRA: What's off is your obsession with money.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't try to change the subject.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, not that! I mean this mansion!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That Abomination in there. Does it look like something that belongs in an ordinary house?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-well...
